title: Add a Time Column to MY WORK
excerpt: I would like to be able to see an estimated time for a task on the MY WORK board. I can currently see all the tasks assigned to someone and the dates they are due… but organizing them would be SOOOOOOO mush easier if i c…

posts.author: jreid0406 (Josh Reid)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to see an estimated time for a task on the MY WORK board. I can currently see all the tasks assigned to someone and the dates they are due… but organizing them would be SOOOOOOO mush easier if i could also pull in the time estimated column which already exists on the boards anyway.

posts.author: IamHere (Annie)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. This would make it easier to calculate chargable hours on a daily basis. Everyone in our team (10) would use this.
